title: Why IREN Limited Skyrocketed 285% in 2025
text:
IREN transformed from a modest Bitcoin mining operation into a highly sought-after AI neocloud provider during 2025, driving its stock up 284.6% for the year.

The company's meteoric rise stemmed from investors recognizing a critical constraint in AI infrastructure: not semiconductor chips, but reliable power supply. IREN had strategically accumulated 2.91 gigawatts total of grid-connected renewable energy assets positioned perfectly for the AI boom.

Key catalysts included: August 2024 - IREN secured preferred partner status with Nvidia, enabling plans to acquire 10,900 GPUs by year-end; November 2024 - Microsoft signed a landmark $9.7 billion five-year agreement, with Microsoft prepaying one year's worth of services to fund buildout at IREN's Texas facility; Growth trajectory - The company projected $3.4 billion in annualized recurring revenue by the end of 2026.

However, significant challenges remain. IREN still lacks sufficient internal cash flow to fund its expansion and will need substantial capital investment to deploy GPUs across its land holdings.
